subject: feat(backend): implement full Supabase backend and migrate frontend from localStorage
body:
Complete backend implementation per docs/BACKEND_SPEC.md:
- Database schema: 11 tables, 7 enum types, indexes, constraints
- RLS policies for all tables with project membership helpers
- Business logic: 15 triggers/RPCs (auto-lock, amendment, split, signing)
- Cron jobs: daily nudge and auto-expiry schedulers via pg_cron
- Edge Functions: send-invitation (bcrypt+Resend) and verify-passphrase
- Seed data: 6 module templates

Frontend migration from localStorage to Supabase:
- Rewrote all 9 hooks to use Supabase queries with realtime subscriptions
- Replaced mock auth with Supabase Auth + Google OAuth
- Added useProjectRole hook for per-project role determination
- Removed role switcher, mock users, client-side notification/signature creation
- Updated pages to use server-side triggers for notifications and logging

Tags: backend, supabase, migration, auth, rls, triggers, edge-functions
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 2
Impact: api
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: backend-implementation
Semver: major
